picks.reasoning: DG model fair: +949. DraftKings +1000 is +4.8% positive EV — the largest model edge in the outright market at cap-eligible prices. Hojgaard ranks above his market position in both the top-10 and top-20 markets simultaneously, a cross-market signal the model treats as more reliable than a single gap. No course-fit weights exist for Shinnecock; this pick is built on model edge alone.

DG model fair: +317. FanDuel +340 is +5.5% positive EV — the highest single-market edge on the board this week. A top-20 line accounts for the volatility inherent in a US Open field while retaining strong expected value. English's ball-striking has been consistent enough that the wider finish band makes this the most efficient play on the card.

DG model fair: +479. Bet365 +500 is +3.7% positive EV. The model ranks Mitchell meaningfully higher than his market position in both the top-20 and top-10 markets. FanDuel also offers +500 on this line — either book works. Approach-heavy profile is a fit for what Shinnecock 2018 data identified as the course's primary skill premium.

DG model fair: +614. DraftKings +630 is +2.3% positive EV. Lee's precision ball-striking profile fits what the 2018 Shinnecock data showed as the course's dominant skill category — approach play from inside 150 yards ranked among the hardest in the dataset. The market has him priced modestly above where the model sees him.

DG model fair: +491. DraftKings +500 is +1.5% positive EV — modest but the clearest edge in the top-5 market at cap-eligible prices. Fleetwood's complete ball-striking game across both approach and ARG categories matches the two skill areas where Shinnecock 2018 separated the field most sharply. More aggressive finish band given the model's high view of his ceiling.
